title: Add Hindi and English language support with paragraph-based organization

requirements.text: Add language selection support for Hindi and English in the recording interface, allowing users to specify the language of their recording

quotes: And recording of and recording, start Hindi English reading and in paragraph

acceptanceCriteria: Recording interface includes a language selector with Hindi and English options
Selected language is stored with each recording in the backend
Language selection persists across recording sessions

requirements.text: Implement paragraph-based organization for recordings, allowing users to segment and organize their recordings by paragraph units

quotes: And recording of and recording, start Hindi English reading and in paragraph

acceptanceCriteria: Backend data model includes paragraph identification for recordings
Users can specify which paragraph a recording belongs to during recording
Recordings can be filtered and displayed by paragraph in the playback interface
Paragraph organization works alongside the existing 2-7 class structure

requirements.text: Update the recording data model to include language (Hindi/English) and paragraph number fields alongside the existing class label structure

quotes: And recording of and recording, start Hindi English reading and in paragraph

acceptanceCriteria: Recording type includes language field accepting 'hindi' or 'english' values
Recording type includes paragraph number field
Backend API endpoints accept and return language and paragraph data
Migration preserves existing recordings while adding new fields

requirements.text: Enhance the RecordingInterface component with language selector dropdown (Hindi/English) and paragraph number input field

quotes: And recording of and recording, start Hindi English reading and in paragraph

acceptanceCriteria: Language dropdown with Hindi and English options is displayed above the class selector
Paragraph number input field allows users to enter or select paragraph numbers
Selected language and paragraph are sent with recording data on upload
UI follows the existing warm, accessible design theme

requirements.text: Update RecordingsList component to display language and paragraph information for each recording, with optional filtering by language and paragraph

quotes: And recording of and recording, start Hindi English reading and in paragraph

acceptanceCriteria: Recording list items show language badge (Hindi/English) and paragraph number
Users can filter recordings by language
Users can filter recordings by paragraph number
Filtering works in conjunction with existing class-based tabs

constraints: Maintain compatibility with existing 2-7 class structure
Do not modify Internet Identity authentication hooks
Do not modify shadcn UI components in frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Real-time translation between Hindi and English
